positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of various zodiac symbols (Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius, Pisces) integrated into a continuous, elegant circular pattern. The symbols should be rendered in a neo-art deco style, using strong, clean silhouettes and metallic gold and deep sapphire blue tones. The arrangement should feel cosmic and mystical, like celestial constellations flowing around a central void. The style should be reminiscent of polished etching mixed with vibrant vaporwave aesthetics, suitable for printing on apparel. Central composition, symmetrical, high contrast, minimal gradient areas.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, bad anatomy, mutated, out of frame, extra limbs, grainy, low detail, jpeg artifacts, realistic photo, photorealism
